examples.en: Many religions teach people to be kind.
examples.zh: 許多宗教教導人們要善良。

examples.en: She studies world religion at college.
examples.zh: 她在大學研究世界宗教。

examples.en: Everyone has the right to their own belief.
examples.zh: 每個人都有權擁有自己的信念。

examples.en: His belief gives him strength in hard times.
examples.zh: 他的信仰在艱難時給他力量。

examples.en: She kept her faith through many years.
examples.zh: 她多年來保持著信仰。

examples.en: People of different faiths live here in peace.
examples.zh: 不同信仰的人在這裡和平共處。

examples.en: They gather for worship every week.
examples.zh: 他們每週聚在一起做禮拜。

examples.en: People worship in many different ways.
examples.zh: 人們以許多不同的方式敬拜。

examples.en: She likes to pray before she sleeps.
examples.zh: 她喜歡在睡前祈禱。

examples.en: They prayed together for peace.
examples.zh: 他們一起為和平祈禱。

examples.en: He said a short prayer before dinner.
examples.zh: 他在晚餐前做了簡短的禱告。

examples.en: The prayer brought her comfort.
examples.zh: 這篇禱告文帶給她安慰。

img: person with head bowed in prayer

examples.en: We visited an old temple on the hill.
examples.zh: 我們參觀了山上一座古老的寺廟。

examples.en: The temple was quiet and peaceful.
examples.zh: 這座寺廟安靜又祥和。

examples.en: The church stands in the town center.
examples.zh: 教堂位於市鎮中心。

examples.en: Many people go to church on Sunday.
examples.zh: 許多人在星期日上教堂。

img: stone church with a tall spire

examples.en: The mosque has a beautiful blue dome.
examples.zh: 這座清真寺有美麗的藍色圓頂。

examples.en: Visitors remove their shoes at the mosque.
examples.zh: 訪客進清真寺要脫鞋。

examples.en: A small shrine stood by the road.
examples.zh: 路邊立著一座小神龕。

examples.en: People leave flowers at the shrine.
examples.zh: 人們在神龕前留下鮮花。

examples.en: The priest welcomed everyone at the door.
examples.zh: 神父在門口歡迎每個人。

examples.en: A priest led the morning service.
examples.zh: 一位神父主持了早晨的儀式。

img: priest in robes at an altar

examples.en: The monk lives a simple life.
examples.zh: 這位僧侶過著簡樸的生活。

examples.en: Monks walked slowly through the garden.
examples.zh: 僧侶們慢慢走過花園。

img: monk in robe walking in temple

examples.en: The nun teaches children at the school.
examples.zh: 這位修女在學校教孩子們。

examples.en: A kind nun helped the sick.
examples.zh: 一位善良的修女幫助病人。

img: nun in habit reading a book

examples.en: This is a holy place for many people.
examples.zh: 這對許多人來說是個神聖的地方。

examples.en: They keep the holy day with care.
examples.zh: 他們謹慎地守著這個聖日。

examples.en: The mountain is sacred to the local people.
examples.zh: 這座山對當地人來說是神聖的。

examples.en: They treat the old texts as sacred.
examples.zh: 他們把古老的經文視為神聖之物。

examples.en: The ritual is passed down through families.
examples.zh: 這個儀式在家族間代代相傳。

examples.en: Each step of the ritual has a meaning.
examples.zh: 儀式的每個步驟都有意義。

examples.en: The ceremony lasted about an hour.
examples.zh: 典禮持續了大約一小時。

examples.en: Family and friends joined the ceremony.
examples.zh: 親友們參加了這場典禮。

img: people gathered for a solemn ceremony

examples.en: They asked for a blessing before the trip.
examples.zh: 他們在旅行前祈求祝福。

examples.en: The elder gave the couple his blessing.
examples.zh: 長者給了這對夫妻他的祝福。

img: elder hand raised over a couple

examples.en: The priest blessed the new house.
examples.zh: 神父為新房子祝福。

examples.en: May this journey be blessed.
examples.zh: 願這趟旅程受到祝福。

img: hand raised in a blessing gesture

examples.en: Many believe the soul lives on.
examples.zh: 許多人相信靈魂會延續。

examples.en: Music can touch the soul.
examples.zh: 音樂能觸動靈魂。

img: glowing light rising to the sky

examples.en: They honor the spirits of their ancestors.
examples.zh: 他們敬奉祖先的靈。

examples.en: A calm spirit helps in hard times.
examples.zh: 平靜的精神在艱難時有幫助。

examples.en: Some believe good people go to heaven.
examples.zh: 有些人相信好人會上天堂。

examples.en: The old story describes a peaceful heaven.
examples.zh: 這個古老故事描述了一個平靜的天堂。

examples.en: Pilgrims travel far to reach the holy city.
examples.zh: 朝聖者遠道而來到聖城。

examples.en: The pilgrim rested along the way.
examples.zh: 朝聖者在途中休息。

img: traveler walking a long mountain path

examples.en: He made a pilgrimage to the ancient site.
examples.zh: 他到古老聖地朝聖。

examples.en: The pilgrimage takes several days on foot.
examples.zh: 這趟朝聖之旅需徒步好幾天。

img: crowd walking toward a holy site

examples.en: She reads scripture every morning.
examples.zh: 她每天早上讀經。

examples.en: The old scripture is kept in the library.
examples.zh: 這部古老經典保存在圖書館裡。

examples.en: The choir sang a joyful gospel song.
examples.zh: 唱詩班唱了一首歡樂的福音歌曲。

examples.en: He shared the gospel with kindness.
examples.zh: 他以善意分享福音。

img: open book with a cross on the cover

examples.en: Flowers were placed on the altar.
examples.zh: 祭壇上擺放著鮮花。

examples.en: The altar stood at the front of the hall.
examples.zh: 祭壇立在大廳的前方。

examples.en: The smell of incense filled the room.
examples.zh: 薰香的味道充滿了房間。

examples.en: People burn incense at the temple.
examples.zh: 人們在寺廟裡燒香。

examples.en: They lit a candle in memory of a friend.
examples.zh: 他們點了一支蠟燭紀念一位朋友。

examples.en: Rows of candles glowed softly.
examples.zh: 一排排蠟燭柔和地發光。

img: rows of lit candles in a hall

examples.en: The whole town joins the spring festival.
examples.zh: 全鎮的人都參加春季節慶。

examples.en: Lights and music fill the festival.
examples.zh: 燈光與音樂充滿整個節慶。

examples.en: He held the pray beads while sitting quietly.
examples.zh: 他安靜地坐著,手握念珠。

examples.en: The old pray beads were smooth and worn.
examples.zh: 這串舊念珠光滑而磨損。

examples.en: The soft chant echoed in the hall.
examples.zh: 柔和的唱誦在大廳中迴盪。

examples.en: They chant together at dawn.
examples.zh: 他們在黎明時一起唱誦。

examples.en: The choir sang a gentle hymn.
examples.zh: 唱詩班唱了一首溫柔的聖歌。

examples.en: Everyone joined in the hymn.
examples.zh: 每個人都加入唱這首聖歌。

examples.en: Every culture has its own myths.
examples.zh: 每種文化都有自己的神話。

examples.en: The myth explains how the world began.
examples.zh: 這則神話解釋了世界如何開始。

img: ancient painting of gods and stars

examples.en: The old story tells of a wise deity.
examples.zh: 這個古老故事講述一位睿智的神祇。

examples.en: Each deity had a special role.
examples.zh: 每位神祇都有特別的角色。

img: stone statue of an ancient god

examples.en: A small idol sat on the shelf.
examples.zh: 架子上放著一尊小神像。

examples.en: People bow before the ancient idol.
examples.zh: 人們在古老的神像前鞠躬。

examples.en: Meditation helps her stay calm.
examples.zh: 冥想幫助她保持平靜。

examples.en: They practice meditation each morning.
examples.zh: 他們每天早上練習靜坐。

img: person sitting cross-legged with eyes closed

examples.en: He likes to meditate by the river.
examples.zh: 他喜歡在河邊冥想。

examples.en: She meditates for ten minutes a day.
examples.zh: 她每天冥想十分鐘。

examples.en: Fasting is part of the holy month.
examples.zh: 齋戒是這個聖月的一部分。

examples.en: They break the fasting after sunset.
examples.zh: 他們在日落後結束齋戒。

img: empty plate with dates and water

examples.en: They placed fruit as an offering.
examples.zh: 他們擺放水果作為供品。

examples.en: The offering was left at the altar.
examples.zh: 供品被留在祭壇上。

img: fruit and flowers on a temple table

examples.en: The sermon was short and clear.
examples.zh: 這場講道簡短又清楚。

examples.en: People listened quietly to the sermon.
examples.zh: 人們安靜地聽著講道。

img: speaker at a pulpit before a crowd

examples.en: The congregation stood up to sing.
examples.zh: 會眾起立唱歌。

examples.en: A large congregation filled the hall.
examples.zh: 一大群會眾坐滿了大廳。

img: rows of people seated in a hall

examples.en: The teacher had many disciples.
examples.zh: 這位老師有許多弟子。

examples.en: A disciple wrote down his words.
examples.zh: 一位弟子記下了他的話。

examples.en: She made a vow to help others.
examples.zh: 她立下誓言要幫助他人。

examples.en: They took their vows in a quiet room.
examples.zh: 他們在安靜的房間裡立下誓言。

img: two people holding hands making a promise

examples.en: They gave thanks for the grace they received.
examples.zh: 他們為所領受的恩典獻上感謝。

examples.en: She said grace before the meal.
examples.zh: 她在用餐前做了謝飯禱告。

img: hands folded over a set table

examples.en: Some believe good deeds bring good karma.
examples.zh: 有些人相信善行會帶來好的因果。

examples.en: He talked about karma with his friends.
examples.zh: 他和朋友談論因果。

img: balanced scale with light and dark

examples.en: The painting shows a divine light.
examples.zh: 這幅畫描繪了神聖的光。

examples.en: They saw it as a divine sign.
examples.zh: 他們把它視為神的徵兆。

img: rays of light breaking through clouds

examples.en: They speak of eternal peace.
examples.zh: 他們談論永恆的平安。

examples.en: The idea of eternal life gives them hope.
examples.zh: 永生的觀念帶給他們希望。

examples.en: People congregate at the temple on holidays.
examples.zh: 節日時人們聚集在寺廟。

examples.en: They congregate to celebrate together.
examples.zh: 他們聚集在一起慶祝。

examples.en: The old cathedral has tall stone windows.
examples.zh: 這座古老的大教堂有高大的石窗。

examples.en: Tourists admire the grand cathedral.
examples.zh: 遊客們讚嘆這座宏偉的大教堂。
